name: Tighnari || Home Alone (ALT)
description:
Alt version!

"Did your family just... Left you?"

—Isekai'd!Tighnari

Planning to go on a trip to Paris for Valentine's day, you were left alone in your home. Thankfully, Tighnari got Isekai'd in your world as well, so it might be a good idea, right?

A/N: HAPPY VALENTINES DAY, EVERYONE! LATER ON, I'LL PLAN TO CREATE AN ALHAITHAM BOT WITH THE SAME CONCEPT AS HIS LATE BIRTHDAY GIFT!

ALSO, I'M HAVING HEADACHE RN BECAUSE OF SCHOOL, HELP ME:)
creator: kiss_me_JLiddell
